fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Oregon Speech-Language Pathologist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a speech-language pathologist? Here's whether your license transfers to Oregon - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: speech-language pathologist license reciprocity oregon, how to transfer speech-language pathologist license to oregon, speech-language pathologist compact oregon, oregon speech-language pathologist endorsement application

board.name: Board of Examiners for Speech-Language Pathology and Audiology
board.parent_dept: Oregon Board of Examiners for SLP and Audiology
board.mailing_address: 800 NE Oregon St., Suite 407, Portland, OR 97232
board.physical_address: 800 NE Oregon St., Suite 407, Portland, OR 97232

license_types.title: Licensed Speech-Language Pathologist
license_types.description: Full credential for independent SLP practice in Oregon.

license_types.title: Provisional SLP License
license_types.description: For SLP graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.

steps.title: Complete Education Requirements
steps.description: Earn a master's degree or doctoral degree in speech-language pathology from an accredited educational institution.

steps.title: Complete Supervised Professional Experience
steps.description: Complete a supervised professional experience (clinical fellowship) as specified by the board.

steps.title: Pass the National Examination and Apply for Licensure
steps.description: Pass the Praxis Examination in Speech-Language Pathology and submit an application for licensure to the Oregon Board of Examiners for Speech-Language Pathology and Audiology.

documents.detail: Oregon State Police and FBI background check.

telepractice_text: Oregon permits telepractice for licensed SLPs. Oregon is not currently a member of the ASLP Interstate Compact.
provisional_text: Oregon issues a Provisional SLP License for graduates completing their Clinical Fellowship.
reciprocity_text: Oregon does not participate in the ASLP Interstate Compact.

faqs.question: How much does an Oregon SLP license cost?
Is Oregon part of the ASLP Interstate Compact?
Does Oregon allow telepractice for SLPs?
faqs.answer: Yes, with a valid OR license.

faqs.question: Does Oregon have reciprocity for speech-language pathologists?
faqs.answer: No interstate compact currently covers speech-language pathologist practice in Oregon. To work in Oregon, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my speech-language pathologist license to Oregon?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 weeks. If you qualify for an active compact privilege, there may be no separate wait to start practicing.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Oregon while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Oregon does not participate in the ASLP Interstate Compact.

hero.title: Become a Speech-Language Pathologist in Oregon
hero.dek: Oregon Speech-Language Pathologist license requires a master's degree, supervised professional experience, and passing the Praxis examination.
